div.style: display:none; position:fixed; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5); z-index:9999; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
background:#fff; border-radius:12px; padding:32px 40px; text-align:center; box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
div.p: Please wait, this may take a moment for large files.

textarea.name: x_experience
textarea.placeholder: Describe your professional experience, roles, responsibilities, and achievements...

input.name: x_skills
input.placeholder: e.g., Python, Project Management, Data Analysis...

div.label: Employee Disclaimer – I, hereby confirm that the information updated by me is accurate and complete to the best of my knowledge. I agree to keep my data updated at all times and consent to the collection and use of such information, for employment administration and legal compliances. I acknowledge that any false or incomplete information may lead to actions in accordance with company policies and applicable laws.
